description.ko: 순수한 빛이 생동감 넘치는 색상 팔레트로 변하는 순간을 포착한 이 PRISM-2 테마는 굴절의 물리학을 통해 복잡성을 명확하고 아름다운 구성 요소로 분해하는 분석적 능력을 나타냅니다.
description.en: Capturing the moment pure light transforms into a vibrant color palette, this PRISM-2 theme represents the analytical power of breaking down complexity into clear, beautiful components through the physics of refraction.

prompt: A cinematic close-up of a triangular crystal prism resting on a minimalist dark surface. A sharp beam of brilliant white light enters the prism at an angle, undergoing internal reflection and emerging as a vivid, fanned-out rainbow spectrum. High-detail glass refraction, realistic light dispersion, subtle lens flares, volumetric lighting, 8k resolution, sharp focus on the emerging colors.
